# Spell Pipeline

## When to Use
- Adding a new spell.
- Refactoring spell data and runtime logic.
- Updating quickbar/cooldown behavior.

## Procedure
1. Define spell data contract.
2. Implement cast-state and cooldown rules.
3. Wire visual and audio feedback hooks.
4. Validate quickbar and input integration.
5. Test stress scenarios.

## References
- [Spell template](./assets/spell-template.md)
- [Spell test checklist](./assets/spell-test-checklist.md)
